recommended_priority_sources.policy: eligible when the item resolves to a paper, DOI, or technical report

recommended_priority_sources.policy: eligible; prefer paper URLs over discussion-only pages

recommended_priority_sources.policy: eligible for research, safety, engineering, and evaluation posts

recommended_priority_sources.policy: eligible for research, model, science-AI, safety, and evaluation posts

recommended_priority_sources.policy: eligible for research, engineering, safety, security, and agent/API posts

recommended_priority_sources.name: Interconnects AI
recommended_priority_sources.policy: needs_review unless the item links to a public technical article or paper

recommended_priority_sources.name: Ahead of AI
recommended_priority_sources.policy: needs_review unless the item links to a public technical article or paper

recommended_priority_sources.policy: eligible for CUDA, inference, serving, GPU, and MLOps technical posts

notes: Example only; do not commit real mailbox exports or credentials.
newsletter_ingest.py reads local .mbox/.jsonl exports and does not authenticate to Google.
Allowlist entries admit candidate messages only; academic_technical_eligibility still rejects jobs, social/admin notices, generic market items, and non-technical posts.
